content.boundary: Applies only to volunteering pilot regions/maintainers for a defined multi-year evaluation period; does not mandate national structural change; excludes vocational-track content and higher-education admission per scope.
content.change_lever: Regional pilot authority granted to a subset of maintainers/counties to convert 6-/8-year admission points into a comprehensive grade 5-9 structure with in-school ability-appropriate enrichment, evaluated via matched comparison design.
content.name: Comprehensive lower-secondary pilot with opt-in enrichment (Finnish-inspired de-tracking pilot)
content.system_problem: The effect of early tracking on mean performance is contested across studies, while the inequality effect is consistently replicated; Hungary lacks robust within-country experimental evidence isolating the track-structure effect from confounding school-quality and geographic factors.
